uk: 🕃 Св. отця нашого Івана Милостивого, патріарха Олександрійського
saints.en: Hieromartyr Josaphat, Archbishop of Polotsk. St. John the Merciful, Patriarch of Alexandria. Ven. Nilus. Blessed Hieromartyr Gregory Lakota, Bishop

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» - 8 стихир свщмч., Слава: свщмч., І нині: богородичний-догмат за гласом «Слава». Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання свщмч.: Прип. 3:13-16, 8:4, Муд. 4:7,16-20, 5:1-7, Муд. 5:15-6:3. Стихири на литії свщмч. На стиховні – стихири свщмч., зі своїми приспівами, Слава: свщмч., І нині: богород. з воскресної стиховні за гласом «Слава». На благословенні хлібів: Тропар свщмч. (2), і «Богородице Діво» (1). Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби свщмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свщмч. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря свщмч. Катизми чергові зі сідальними свщмч., також полієлей з величаннями і пополієлейний сідальний свщмч. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен, Єв. – Ів. 35 зач.; 10, 1-9. Пс. 50, і стихира свщмч. Канон Богородиці і свщмч. Катавасія чергова - «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний свщмч., по 6-ій – кондак-ікос свщмч., по 9-ій – світильний свщмч. На хвалитних – 4 стихири свщмч., Слава: свщмч., І нині: богород. за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар свщмч., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря свщмч. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби свщмч.
Часи: на всіх - тропар і кондак свщмч.
Літургія: антифони повсякденні (або зображальні), все інше – тільки свщмч. Свщмч.: Ап. – Євр. 311 зач.; 4, 14 – 5, 10. Єв. – Ів. 36 зач.; 10, 9-16.

troparion_en.text: By endurance you gained your reward, venerable Father; / you persevered in prayer unceasingly; / you loved the poor and provided for them in all things. / Blessed John the Merciful, intercede with Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion_en.text: You distributed your wealth to the poor / and in return obtained wealth from heaven, John the Merciful. / Therefore, we honor you and celebrate your memory, O namesake of mercy.

matched_oca_saint: Saint John the Merciful, Patriarch of Alexandria

oca_saints.name: Saint John the Merciful, Patriarch of Alexandria

troparion.text: By endurance you gained your reward, venerable Father; / you persevered in prayer unceasingly; / you loved the poor and provided for them in all things. / Blessed John the Merciful, intercede with Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: You distributed your wealth to the poor / and in return obtained wealth from heaven, John the Merciful. / Therefore, we honor you and celebrate your memory, O namesake of mercy.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Neilos the Ascetic of Sinai

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, /  and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / Our Father Neilos, pray to Christ God to save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “O Victorious Leader...”)
O blessed Neilos, like firewood, you cut away the branches of corporeal passions by your prayerful vigil;  / and as one having boldness before the Lord, deliver me from every possible danger that I may cry to you:  / “Hail, O Father revered by all the world.”

oca_saints.name: Blessed John “the Hairy” and Fool-For-Christ at Rostov

troparion.text: In your patience, you possessed your reward, O holy father. / You were constant in prayer, while loving and aiding the poor. / Beseech Christ God, O John the merciful, that He may save our souls!

kontakion.text: By distributing your wealth to the poor, O John most wise, / you gained the wealth of heaven and were called the merciful one: / Therefore we honor you and celebrate your holy memory!

troparion.text: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Ahijah, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Enlightened by the Spirit, your pure heart became the dwelling place of most splendid prophecy; / for you saw things far off as if they were near.  / Therefore, we honor you, blessed and glorious Prophet Ahijah.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Nilus the Myrrhgusher of Mount Athos

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Nilus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
